---
name: "Feature request"
about: Suggest a new capability
title: "[feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is the user?

## Proposed solution

What would the feature look like in practice? If it adds to a contract surface, please reference [`docs/contracts.md`](../docs/contracts.md) and indicate which section.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you dropped them.

## Module affected

Which module(s) would own this change? See [`docs/modules/README.md`](../docs/modules/README.md).

- [ ] Phase 0 (contracts) — requires the two-person rule
- [ ] M0 core
- [ ] M1 llm
- [ ] M2 voice
- [ ] M3 avatar (core)
- [ ] M4 sprite2d
- [ ] M5 tasks
- [ ] M6 backend
- [ ] M7 frontend
- [ ] M8 tauri
- [ ] M9 threejs / M10 live3d / M11 unity / M12 external
- [ ] Other / cross-cutting

## Additional context

Mockups, links, prior art.
